summary: Closed the remaining travel canvas widget rerun AMBER. The canvas now keeps widget command reruns in place on /travel, creates a fresh execution, appends a fresh widget, and clears loading.

gui_prs.change: Assistant messages now retain sourcePrompt; canvas command events map rerun <execution_id> back to the original travel query. Widget buttons explicitly render as htmlType=button.
AppButton consumes DOM clicks with preventDefault and stopPropagation before emitting widget events so parent routed surfaces cannot treat a widget click as navigation/form activity.

deployment.note: bump_image verify_images reported the known completed-old-pod sampling mismatch, but explicit rollout status and the running pod image confirmed v1.10.4.

browser_smoke.rendered_widget: Travel agent · search failed app:column friendly-error widget

notes: The global click test originally kept failing because older browser tabs and persisted session messages made it easy to hit pre-fix contexts. Final verification used the v1.10.4 deployed image and scoped the click to .gateway-assistant-wrap.

The v1.10.4 release-image workflow triggered by the release event stalled in Docker build/push and was cancelled after about 25 minutes. The same versioned build was rerun via workflow_dispatch for tag v1.10.4 and completed successfully.
No product-code changes were made outside repos/gui.
deferred_followups: Consider adding a lightweight GUI unit/integration test for AppButton command events in GatewayAssistant.
Document the canvas command-routing rule alongside the render-tail and Input.Search preventDefault rules.

Feature backlog remains: audit side effects inside render_*, gateway SSE callback side effects, multi-provider keychain, travel via Amadeus MCP internally, hotels/activities branches, and app:form refinement.
